gates.name: item_count
gates.description: Batch must contain exactly the requested number of slogans

gates.name: word_count
gates.description: Each slogan must be 10 words or fewer

gates.name: character_names
gates.description: At least 2 slogans must reference a named LOTR character
gates.error_message: Only {actual} slogans contain named LOTR characters (need >= 2)

gates.name: product_type
gates.description: Each slogan must include a product type annotation
gates.error_message: Only {actual} slogans have product type annotations (need {count})

gates.name: no_footnotes
gates.description: No explanations, footnotes, or commentary between slogans
